data.title: Bitcoin-Focused Metaplanet to Spit Stock 10:1 After 3,900% Price Surge
data.description:
• Metaplanet will conduct a 10-for-1 stock split effective April 1.
  • The split comes after a 3,900% stock surge and aims to lower the minimum investment cost and improve market liquidity.

data.title: U.S.-Listed Bitcoin Miners Accounted for 29% of Global Hashrate in February: JPMorgan
data.description:
• The bitcoin mining companies the bank tracks now account for around 29% of the global network hashrate, almost double the level a year ago.
  • The Bitcoin network hashrate has risen 6% this month, the report noted.
  • JPMorgan said daily mining profitability fell 13% from the end of January.

data.title: Robinhood to Introduce Crypto Products in Singapore This Year: Bloomberg
data.description:
• Trading platform Robinhood plans to debut crypto products in Singapore this year.
  • The introduction should follow shortly after it completes the $200 million acquisition of crypto exchange Bitstamp.

data.title: LIBRA Apparent Rug Pull Is Latest 'Sordid Episode' Emerging From Solana's Memecoin Complex: Galaxy
data.description:
• Fallout from the LIBRA token has hurt the Solana memecoin ecosystem, the report said.
  • Galaxy said the memecoin narrative began to sour following the introduction of the TRUMP token in January.
  • SOL has slumped against both the U.S. dollar and ether following the launch of LIBRA, Galaxy noted.

data.title: NFT Collector Buys Digital Art for $3M, Largest Sale in 3 Years
data.description:
• Art collective purchase Sam Spratt's 1-of-1 artwork for $3 million.
  • Supporters of Spratt's work can participate in the Masquerade game over the coming days by purchasing a mask NFT.
  • The purchase comes after dwindling volume across the NFT sector since 2022.

data.title: Creator of Controversial LIBRA Memecoin Introduced MELANIA, Says He Sniped Both Tokens
data.description:
• Hayden Davis said he was behind both the MELANIA and LIBRA memecoins.
  • Davis refunded $5 million to Barstool Sports' Dave Portnoy from his personal wallet after investors lost money on LIBRA.
  • In an interview with Coffeezilla, Davis said only outsiders are angry.

data.title: XRP in Focus as Elon Musk’s D.O.G.E Sets Eyes on SEC
data.description:
• A new X account has spurred speculation among XRP holders who believe public pressure or findings from the initiative could reveal conflicts of interest or misconduct within the SEC.
  • D.O.G.E. is a temporary non-governmental agency headed by Musk

data.title: Ether ETFs Register $393M in Inflows This Month as Crypto Investors Turn Their Back on Bitcoin
data.description:
• Ether spot ETFs have seen a net inflow of $393 million this month, per Farside Investors.
  • Bitcoin ETFs have seen net outflows of $376 million.
  • The impending Pectra upgrade could lift ether prices.
  • "ETH has a solid foundation for a resurgence," said Nick Forster, of Derive.xyz.

data.title: Bitcoin Is Coiled Like a Spring, A Breakout of This Range is Coming: Van Straten
data.description:
• Bitcoin’s volatility on both a realized and implied basis is near multi-year lows.
  • Data shows that bitcoin’s “choppiness index” is at one of its highest levels in years.

data.title: Donald Trump’s Official Memecoin Rewards TRUMP Faithfuls With $50 Airdrop
data.description:
• Three TRUMP tokens, worth just over $50 at writing time, will be given to past buyers of Trump’s perfumes, sneakers, cards or watches per email address they used to conduct these purchases.
  • The tokens can be claimed until Mar.1.
